title: C-VAN - 211info
text: C-TRAN C-VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a paratransit service. Individuals must complete pre-application questionnaire prior to an in-person evaluation. Ride reservations must be made 24-48 hours in advance. 10600 NE 51st Circle Vancouver, WA 98682 Eligibility: Individuals with disabilities unable to use regular C-Tran buses Hours: C-Van: Monday-Friday 5:30am-midnight, Saturday-Sunday 6am-11pm Customer service: 7 days a week 8am-5pm Email (360) 695-8918 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 695-8918 C-VAN Alternate (360) 695-0123 Customer Service TTY/TTD (800) 421-1220 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for application or more information FEES: One-way cash fares within Clark County are $1.25. Monthly passes are $59. Those with who are age 18 and under or have honored or reduced passes may use the service for free. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland (Multnomah County only) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: C-Tran bus 80 stops in front of the administration office. Services: Disability Related Transportation Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - LOCAL BUS SERVICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. C-TRAN
